memoryArtifacts.headline: Mary Stearns Burge (6 January 1626 – 8 January 1663)
memoryArtifacts.description:
Mary, eldest known child of Isaac & Mary (Barker) Stearns, was baptized at Nayland with Wissington, 6 January 1625/6. 

She married at Woburn 9 July 1646 Isaac Learned, son of William Learned.

Source …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Stearns於1626年1月6日出生在英國素福爾可納易藍德時，她的父親Isaac Stearns29歲，母親Mary Barker22歲。她於1646年7月9日與Isaac Learned I在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1664年1月9日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可傑爾姆斯福德享年38歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Stearns于1626年1月6日出生在英国素福爾可納易藍德时，她的父亲Isaac Stearns29岁，母亲Mary Barker22岁。她于1646年7月9日与Isaac Learned I在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1664年1月9日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可傑爾姆斯福德享年38岁。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Stearn , with post-medieval excrescent -s (see Stern ).
History: In 1646 Charles Stearns was admitted as a freeman of Watertown, MA.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Stearns was born on 6 January 1626, in Nayland, Suffolk, England, her father, Isaac Stearns, was 29 and her mother, Mary Barker, was 22. She married Isaac Learned I on 9 July 1646, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 9 January 1664, in Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 38.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Stearns est née le 6 janvier 1626, à Nayland, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Isaac Stearns, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mary Barker, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Isaac Learned I le 9 juillet 1646, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 9 janvier 1664, à Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 38 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Stearns am 6. Januar 1626 in Nayland, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Isaac Stearns 29 und ihre Mutter Mary Barker 22. Sie hat am 9. Juli 1646 in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Isaac Learned I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 9. Januar 1664 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Stearns è nata il il 6 gennaio 1626 nel Nayland, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Isaac Stearns, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Mary Barker, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Isaac Learned I il 9 luglio 1646, nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 9 gennaio 1664, nel Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 38 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Stearnsが1626年1月6日にイギリススフォルクナイランドで生まれた時，父Isaac Stearnsは29歳，母Mary Barkerは22歳であった。1646年7月9日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンでIsaac Learned Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1664年1月9日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスチェルムスフォードで38歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Stearns(이)가 1626년 1월 6일 영국 수폴크 나이랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Isaac Stearns(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Barker(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1646년 7월 9일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 Isaac Learned I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1664년 1월 9일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 헬스퍼드에서 38세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Stearns nasceu em 6 de janeiro de 1626, em Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Isaac Stearns, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mary Barker, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Isaac Learned I em 9 de julho de 1646, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 9 de janeiro de 1664, em Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 38 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Stearns родилась 6 января 1626 г. в местности неиланд, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Isaac Stearns было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Barker, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Isaac Learned I 9 июля 1646 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 9 января 1664 г. в местности челмсфорд, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 38 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Stearns nació el 6 de enero de 1626, en Nayland, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Isaac Stearns, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Mary Barker, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Isaac Learned I el 9 de julio de 1646, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 9 de enero de 1664, en Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 38 años.
